name: bufab-mcp
description: MCP server: Azure WAF (waf_guidelines), infrastructure rules (rules_* / BUFAB_RULES_DB_PATH), UI guidelines fragments (ui_* / ui_section_spec / ui_token / ui_export / ui_export_markdown / BUFAB_UI_DB_PATH, BUFAB_UI_FORCE_RESEED). Env: BUFAB_EMBEDDING_MODEL, BUFAB_UI_EMBEDDING_MODEL.
